PABLO ARROYO

AI PRODUCT MANAGER | VIBECODER

With over 8 years of experience, I orchestrate teams, optimize processes, and deliver impact using AI.

PROFESSIONAL TRAJECTORY

My career, step by step.

Zebrands

Technology Product Manager

Aug 2022 - Present

Led +15 annual projects. Achieved +$500K USD in savings with a FedEx MVP. Generated +$1.1M USD through e-commerce strategies.

Tecnológico de Monterrey

Project Management Professor

Aug 2021 - Present

Training future engineers in agile methodologies, with 90% application in real projects with companies like Coca-Cola FEMSA.

Natgas

IT Project Manager

Nov 2018 - Aug 2022

Managed a $420K USD budget. Implemented RPA to reduce repetitive tasks by 87%. Improved team efficiency by 25%.

Professionals in Logistics and Transportation

Logistics Consultant

Jul 2017 - Oct 2018

Advised companies like Cargill and Uber Freight, identifying 15-20% savings opportunities in transport and supply chain.

Featured Projects

Success stories that demonstrate impact.

🚚

FedEx Integration MVP

Designed and launched an MVP to connect our WMS with FedEx, automating 18,500 packages and reducing manual errors by 40%.

Result: +$500K USD in annual savings.

at Zebrands
💰

Cross-sell Strategy

Implemented UX improvements to boost cross-selling and up-selling in e-commerce.

Result: +$450K USD in extra revenue.

at Zebrands
🏪

Omnichannel: In-Store Pickup

Optimized the 'In-Store Pickup' program, redesigning the e-commerce and logistics flow.

Result: +$725K USD in attributed sales.

at Zebrands
🤖

RPA Automation

Led the implementation of RPA to mitigate operational risks, automating tasks and freeing up the team for higher-value activities.

Result: 87% reduction in repetitive tasks.

at Natgas
🌍

Global Project Management

Coordinated projects with suppliers in Denmark and the US, managing deliverables, contracts, and the integration roadmap in English.

Result: Successful alignment of international teams.

at Zebrands
👥

The Agile Classroom

As a professor, I train the next generation of engineers in Scrum, Kanban, and KPI management with Power BI.

Result: 90% of students apply the techniques.

at Tec de Monterrey

AI PROTOTYPES & PROJECTS

Showcasing my capability to build with AI.

Vibecoding
🏦

Retiro MX ↗

Personal Retirement Simulator for Mexico projecting future pension considering AFORE, PPR, and Private Savings. Features personalized AI-driven bilingual recommendations powered by Google Gemini and clear legal-logic modeling for Mexican pensions (Ley 97).

Tech Stack:

Vibecoding Next.js 14 TypeScript Tailwind CSS Google Gemini Vercel
Vibecoding
🖼️

Zebrands Image Converter ↗

A high-performance utility designed to streamline e-commerce operations by optimizing visual assets. This tool enables fast, high-quality local conversion from PNG/JPG to WebP, significantly reducing page load times. Developed with a focus on UX efficiency and local processing to ensure data privacy and speed.

Tech Stack:

Vibecoding React Tailwind CSS Vite Local Asset Conversion
